message:
fix(packs): add external pack loading to corpus test and smoke test paths

Two more evaluation paths were missing external pack loading:

- Corpus test (run_single_corpus_test): used for regression testing custom
  pack patterns, but only loaded built-in packs — making it impossible to
  test or validate custom pack behavior
- Smoke test (run_smoke_test): validation utility that only checked built-in
  packs, giving false confidence when custom packs are configured

Both now mirror the standard external pack loading pattern.

This completes the audit of all 8 evaluation code paths — all now have
parity for external pack loading.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
